qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Authenticated SSRF via workflow import URL endpoint
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes SQL injection in the Data Table Get node via orderByColumn expression (CWE-89). This finding describes SSRF via the workflow import URL endpoint (GET /rest/workflows/from-url) with a completely different root cause (missing URL validation on axios.get), different vulnerable component, and different vulnerability class.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The advisory (GHSA-98c2-4cr3-4jc3) describes a SQL injection vulnerability in n8n's Data Table Get node via the orderByColumn expression parameter (CWE-89). The sole qualifying finding (ssrf-via-workflow-import-url) describes SSRF via a different endpoint (GET /rest/workflows/from-url) with a different root cause (missing URL validation on axios.get). No finding identifies the SQL injection in the Data Table node's orderByColumn handling.
evidence: Advisory describes SQL injection (CWE-89) in Data Table Get node via orderByColumn expression in n8n.
ssrf-via-workflow-import-url describes SSRF via GET /rest/workflows/from-url - different vulnerability class and root cause.
